AI trading workflow

Claude + TradingView MCP: safe setup guide

The TradingView MCP repository referenced in the Reel, with guardrails for connecting it to Claude.

What you’re getting

Inspect the open-source integration first, keep live execution disabled, and validate the workflow with paper trading or read-only analysis.

Use it well

A three-step starting point.

  1. 01

    Read the repository README and code before installing or granting access.

  2. 02

    Connect only the data and tools you need; never paste broker credentials into a chat.

  3. 03

    Start with paper trading and require a human confirmation before any consequential action.

Verified destinations

Open the sources.

TradingView MCP repository ↗ Open Claude ↗ TradingView ↗

Important context

This is a software integration guide, not financial advice or a promise of trading performance.
